SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF ANTONIO FRANCISCO KAM DA SILVA ANDRADE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT WEWORK COMPANIES LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF GIVES THE COURTROOM CLERK ORAL AUTHORIZATION FOR STIPULATION FOR JPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DA SILVA ANDRADE, ANTONIO FRANCISCO KAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEWORK COMPANIES LLC $488.85 PRINCIPAL, $106.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $594.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
